papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: We introduce the Transformer, a sequence transduction model based entirely on attention mechanisms.

papers.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: LoRA freezes pretrained model weights and injects trainable low-rank adapters for efficient adaptation.

papers.title: FlashAttention: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact Attention
papers.abstract: FlashAttention improves Transformer attention by reducing memory reads and writes with tiling and recomputation.

papers.title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs
papers.abstract: QLoRA combines low-rank adapters with quantization to make large model finetuning memory efficient.

papers.title: LongLoRA: Efficient Fine-tuning of Long-Context Large Language Models
papers.abstract: LongLoRA adapts LoRA to long-context training with shifted sparse attention and parameter-efficient tuning.
